reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — REAL WASM run: fresh profile → Download (~98 MB) → auto-init → ready, then grazh/agentlans-flan-t5-small-simplifier-onnx-v2 rewrote the input in a Web Worker with a streamed TextStreamer; 0 console errors, 0px overflow. Verify sample 'The utilization of this methodology facilitates the amelioration of comprehension among individuals possessing limited domain expertise.' → 'The use of this methodology helps to improve comprehension among individuals with limited domain knowledge.' Standalone probe on a legal clause: 'Notwithstanding the foregoing provisions, the lessee shall be obligated to remit payment prior to the commencement of the tenancy period.' → 'The lessee shall be obliged to pay before the commencement of the tenancy period.' Genuine simplification, not a summariser/paraphraser relabel.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified real seq2seq simplification off the main thread.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — real greedy decode produced a transformed, plainer output that preserves meaning: fancy words swapped ('utilization'→'use', 'facilitates the amelioration of'→'helps to improve', 'possessing limited domain expertise'→'with limited domain knowledge'). The before/after readability panel (Flesch reading ease + Flesch–Kincaid grade, computed on the page) and the word-level diff both derive from the real input/output. Output is a genuine simplification, streamed token-by-token.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: plainer output + readability delta + diff match the input.

rubric.evidence: At-a-glance declares the exact source id grazh/agentlans-flan-t5-small-simplifier-onnx-v2 (linked to card + agentlans/flan-t5-small-simplifier original), task text2text-generation, backend WebAssembly, quantisation q8 (encoder + merged decoder), ~98 MB, Apache-2.0. Inference runs in a Web Worker. Auto-generated immutable conformance suite (23 assertions) covers declares-model-id / declares-task / declares-backend / declares-quantisation / inference-off-main-thread.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~98 MB)'; after load the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control + storage detail. Encoder + merged decoder ONNX fetched THROUGH Cache Storage so a returning visit is scannable → auto-init, no re-download.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified auto-init path via shared loader.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — download progress streamed on the loader; a Retry button surfaces on failure; simplification failures route to .status.err text (role=status aria-live). Runs on the WASM path (no GPU) and produced real output. The multi-model page loads a second model (MMS-TTS, ~50 MB) on demand with its own loader and honest status.

Agent verdict — the textarea, 5 preset buttons, Simplify, and Clear are all real, labelled, keyboard-operable; presets fill the box, Clear empties + focuses it. Practical/wild pages add a passage textarea + Copy plain version (clipboard) + sample chips; multi-model adds Simplify → Speak with an <audio controls> player. No dead controls.

Agent verdict — the simplified text, the readability scores and the word-level diff are all derived from the on-device worker's real generated output (verified: distinct real rewrites for distinct inputs, streamed live). No canned result.

conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names derived and pass. Diff spans carry aria-label 'added:'/'removed:'; the decode-timeline canvas has an aria-label; status/output are role=status aria-live; readability table uses th scope=row/col and wide tables scroll in an overflow-x:auto wrapper.
rubric.notes: Diff changes announced to SR; labelled canvas; scoped table.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — desktop 1280×900 (light+dark) reviewed: no horizontal overflow (measured 0px), legible text, at-a-glance table wraps, ease-meters + preset-grid use auto-fit minmax and collapse on mobile, before/after grid-2 stacks. Mobile 360×740 DPR3 automated-clean (responsive-check: desktop clean · mobile clean) + agent mobile screenshot reviewed.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: 0px desktop overflow, light+dark clean, meters/grids collapse on mobile.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — all generation runs in a Web Worker with a TextStreamer, so tokens stream without blocking the main thread; the readability computation is O(words) and the word-level diff is an O(n·m) LCS over short arrays, cheap. Main thread stayed responsive during load + decode; 0 console errors.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified off-thread streamed decode; cheap main-thread scoring.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Run heavy work off the main thread / break up long tasks so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all seq2seq generation runs off the main thread in a Web Worker; tokens are streamed back incrementally; readability + diff are cheap main-thread maths.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; worker.js runs pipe() with a TextStreamer

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep the interaction path light so critical work runs first.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — clicking Simplify posts to the worker; the only main-thread work on the interaction path is a short readability pass + LCS diff over word arrays.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: main-thread responsive during decode; 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths; wrap wide content so the body never scrolls horizontally.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — preset-grid, ease-meters, stat-row, controls-grid all use auto-fit minmax; grid-2 (before/after) collapses on mobile; readability table wraps in an overflow-x:auto container; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: desktop 1280 measured 0px horizontal overflow; responsive-check mobile clean

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state + dynamic content in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader + output; diff insert/delete spans carry aria-label 'added:'/'removed:'; labelled buttons/textarea; timeline canvas has aria-label; readability table has scoped headers.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (invariant 6); crumbs link back to the catalogue.

openQuestions: On highly technical input the small (~80M) model can be conservative or lightly paraphrase — should the wild page flag when the reading-ease delta is near zero so users don't over-trust it?
The client-side syllable counter is a heuristic; is a small on-device syllable dictionary worth it for a more accurate Flesch score, or is the relative before/after delta enough?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for the simplifier (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.
Add a 'target audience' preset row (e.g. rewrite for a general reader vs a child) if a suitably-prefixed simplification ONNX becomes available — additive new demo, not a replacement.

summary: Revision-1 agent build+matrix pass for text-simplification: real ~98 MB download + on-device FLAN-T5 seq2seq simplification verified in headless Chrome (genuine plain-language rewrites — 'utilization…facilitates the amelioration of'→'use…helps to improve'; a legal clause reduced to 'The lessee shall be obliged to pay before…' — streamed token-by-token with a live before/after Flesch readability delta and a word-level diff), light+dark desktop + mobile screenshots reviewed (0px overflow), console clean. A genuine simplification ONNX, not a summariser/paraphraser relabel. Auto-derived immutable conformance suite (23 assertions); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
